---
title: 'Vehicle emissions: Diesel pollution long under-reported'
date: '2015-01-01'
author:
- A.C. Lewis
- D.C. Carslaw
- F.J. Kelly
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Nature*'
---

## Vehicle emissions: Diesel pollution long under-reported

<p class="pub-meta">A.C. Lewis, D.C. Carslaw, F.J. Kelly</p>

_*Nature*_, 2015


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2015-d.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
